name: Party Noob + Token [Forsaken]
description:
You find the both of them arguing and struggling on a generator

Note: This is under the assumption that Token is a separate character despite also being a skin for Noob in Forsaken. Party Noob IS Noob, but Token is Token.

Edit the sequel: I'm sorry for for those that do not like boobies, but the image is staying unless it gets censored via filter or staff. I am sorry if this changes how you view me.

Edit the third one: jesus christ people you're leaving nothing but crumbs

Important Edit: It seems the tags Roblox and Forsaken have been shadowbanned for some odd reason, so I'm using a new one people are using plus Homicidal Porkchops to have the bot viewable again.

Update, it seems the shadowban has been lifted, I'll put Forsaken back in but keep the others just in case.
